name: 9mm-v3-position-manager
description: Auto-rebalancing position manager for 9mm v3 (Uniswap v3 fork) on PulseChain

scripts.build: node scripts/build-info.js && node scripts/build-disclosure-content.js && esbuild public/dashboard-init.js --bundle --outfile=public/dist/bundle.js --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2020 && node scripts/cache-bust.js
scripts.clean:
npm run stop 2>/dev/null; npm run reset-wallet && rm -rf test/report-artifacts && rm -f app-config/.bot-config.json app-config/.bot-config.backup.json app-config/.bot-config.v1.json app-config/api-keys.json app-config/rebalance_log.json tmp/event-cache*.json tmp/lp-position-cache*.json tmp/pnl-epochs-cache.json tmp/nft-mint-date-cache.json tmp/historical-price-cache.json tmp/block-time-cache.json tmp/gecko-pool-cache.json public/disclosure-content.js && echo 'Cleaned: server stopped, wallet, bot config, api keys, rebalance log, event cache, price cache, block-time cache, gecko pool cache, check report artifacts, generated disclosure module' && printf '
💡 \033[1;30;43m TIP: Also clear browser localStorage & cookies via the Settings gear icon in the dashboard. \033[0m

'
scripts.dev-clean:
npm run stop 2>/dev/null; npm run reset-wallet && rm -rf test/report-artifacts && rm -f app-config/.bot-config.json app-config/.bot-config.backup.json app-config/.bot-config.v1.json app-config/rebalance_log.json tmp/event-cache*.json tmp/lp-position-cache*.json tmp/pnl-epochs-cache.json tmp/nft-mint-date-cache.json public/disclosure-content.js && echo 'Dev-cleaned: price cache + block-time cache + gecko pool cache preserved for fast restart' && printf '
💡 \033[1;30;43m TIP: Also clear browser localStorage & cookies via the Settings gear icon in the dashboard. \033[0m

'
scripts.lint: eslint src/ test/ scripts/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --max-warnings 0 && stylelint public/*.css && html-validate public/*.html && markdownlint-cli2 README.md CLAUDE.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-SECURITY.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-BEST-PRACTICES.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-TESTING.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-DISCLOSURES.md docs/architecture.md docs/engineering.md
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src/ test/ scripts/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --fix && stylelint public/*.css --fix && html-validate public/*.html && markdownlint-cli2 --fix README.md CLAUDE.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-SECURITY.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-BEST-PRACTICES.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-TESTING.md docs/claude/CLAUDE-DISCLOSURES.md
scripts.audit:security: eslint -c eslint-security.config.js src/ scripts/ server.js bot.js --max-warnings 0
scripts.nuke: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && echo 'Nuked node_modules + package-lock.json — run npm install to reinstall'
